decision_commentary: Completeness scored 5: all four required systems present and confirmed — structural='complete', electrical='complete', lighting='complete', water='complete'. Irrigation is not in scope (excluded in SOW) — no gap. Accuracy scored 5: package explicitly declared complete (all systems='complete', all_inputs_confirmed=true). No pending consultant inputs undeclared. Conflicts declared resolved. Clarity scored 5: conflicts_resolved=true documents that any design conflicts during engineering were resolved — all systems marked complete provides clear handoff signal for Bruno. State_sync scored 3: simulated run. Timing scored 5: package complete before Bruno begins contractor pricing — in correct pipeline position. Decision_readiness scored 5: Bruno can proceed to contractor pricing immediately from this document; no items outstanding.
